arts.ttl: Leicester City team news v Wolves as Danny Ward starts amid three changes
arts.sum: City (4-2-3-1): Ward; Justin, Coady, Vestergaard, Kristiansen; Soumare, Skipp; Ayew, El Khannouss, Mavididi; Vardy. City had been hoping that Hermansen would recover from a groin injury in time to start in the crunch relegation clash but he is missing from the squad.

arts.ttl: Leicester City transfer news latest as 'shock' £8m move lined up and striker message issued
arts.sum: Lens may have to sell up-and-coming centre-back Abdukodir Khusanov this January and City are one of the clubs who would look to take advantage, according to L’Equipe. It’s not just City, who played against him in pre-season, who are taking a look at the 20-year-old.

arts.ttl: Van Nistelrooy finally has Leicester City player who provides the fix he wants
arts.sum: But Ndidi’s injury has opened the door for Winks to play, as have the deficiencies City showed at Newcastle. Aside from their struggles at defending set-pieces, van Nistelrooy felt the big problem was giving up the ball too readily and letting the Magpies counter-attack.

arts.ttl: How to watch Leicester vs Wolves
arts.sum: Leicester vs Wolves kicks off at 2pm with the Matchday Live stream beginning around 30 minutes ahead of kick-off at 1.30pm. Live text coverage of Leicester vs Wolves is also being provided on Saturday afternoon as wolves.co.uk returns with the Matchday Blog, beginning two hours ahead of kick-off.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy bids to solve problem where Leicester City are still the worst in the league
arts.sum: Only Southampton have mustered fewer shots from their own corners and free-kicks, but it’s City who have the lowest expected goals (3.04). In the 2021-22 season, City were a good team who just couldn’t defend corners and free-kicks.

arts.ttl: Leicester vs Wolves: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing the Premier League clash between Leicester and Wolves, including team news, how to watch on TV and predicted lineups.

arts.ttl: Vitor Pereira makes bold Wolves statement and names two Premier League bosses as influences
arts.sum: Vitor Pereira has outlined his vision for Wolves after succeeding Gary O'Neil as manager with his side 19th and under threat of relegation from the Premier League

arts.ttl: Team News: Leicester City vs. Wolverhampton Wanderers injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Leicester City and Wolverhampton Wanderers.

arts.ttl: “Would tell him to come here” – Leicester City player tells Tottenham man to join Foxes
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur’s Alejo Véliz has been asked to consider a move to Leicester City. That’s come from Leicester’s Facundo Buonanotte, and he mentioned the Spurs man during a chat with Sportscenter, relayed by Olé. The 19-year-old attacking midfielder joined Leicester on loan from Brighton & Hove Albion in the summer window, while the Tottenham striker The post “Would tell him to come here” – Leicester City player tells Tottenham man to join Foxes appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Leicester City triple January transfer warning with Riyad Mahrez not the blueprint - Jordan Blackwell - Leicestershire Live
arts.sum: There is an argument that, in fact, signing Robert Huth on loan from Stoke was the most impactful piece of business City have done in the winter window. And history says they need to target signings like Huth when the window opens next month, and heed the triple warning from two years ago.
